title: pelargonium × ramigerum
intro: Pelargonium × ramigerum, also known as Cape Geranium or Rosy Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × ramigerum include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and helping to alleviate cold and flu symptoms. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
